query:
UPDATE posts
     SET status = 'published', published = true
     WHERE id = (
       SELECT id
       FROM posts
       WHERE status = 'draft'
       ORDER BY id
       FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
       LIMIT 1
     )
     RETURNING id AS post_id, user_id, status, published
